title: GitHub - izeigerman/claude-thermos: Keeps your Claude session warm for you
excerpt: Keeps your Claude session warm for you. Contribute to izeigerman/claude-thermos development by creating an account on GitHub.
content_html:
Stop paying to rebuild your Claude Code cache. When your main agent waits on a subagent for more than 5 minutes, its prompt cache silently expires, and the next turn re-encodes your entire conversation at the write rate instead of reading it back cheap. On long sessions with many subagents that's roughly 20% of your bill. claude-thermos keeps the cache warm so you never pay that tax.

Use

Run Claude Code exactly as you normally would, but through claude-thermos with uvx:

uvx claude-thermos                     # instead of: claude
uvx claude-thermos -p "fix the bug"    # any claude args pass straight through

Requires Python 3.11+ and the claude CLI on your PATH.

That's it. Warming runs automatically in the background. To disable it for a run without changing the command, set CLAUDE_WARMER_DISABLE=1.

Tuning (all optional):

Flag Default Meaning
--idle 270 Seconds the main agent must be idle before warming kicks in
--interval 270 Seconds between warming cycles
--max-cycles 4 Max warms per idle episode (auto for unlimited)
--subagent-window 540 Seconds a subagent counts as "still active"

Why your cache keeps expiring

Claude Code's prompt cache uses a 5-minute TTL. Every turn, your whole conversation history is served from cache at 0.1x the input price instead of being re-sent at full price, as long as the cache stays alive.

The cache expires if more than 5 minutes pass between requests on the same prefix. The dominant trigger for that gap is not you thinking. It's the main agent blocked on a subagent that runs longer than 5 minutes. A subagent has a different system prompt and tool set, so its requests have a different cache prefix and never refresh the main agent's. While the subagent works, the main agent's cached history ages untouched; past 5 minutes it's gone. When the subagent returns, the main agent resumes with a byte-identical, append-only history, and finds its cache missing, forcing a full re-encode at the 1.25x write rate.

By then the history is large, so the re-encode is expensive: individual collapses re-write 200K to 500K tokens. Measured across roughly 185 local sessions, these rebuilds accounted for about 22% of the total bill, money spent re-encoding content that was already cached moments earlier.

How it works

claude-thermos launches Claude Code behind a small local reverse proxy (it points ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL at a loopback port; all traffic still goes to the real Anthropic API).

  1. Observe. The proxy watches /v1/messages traffic and groups it into sessions and lineages, a lineage being one cache prefix, keyed by model + tool set + system text. The first tool-bearing lineage is the main agent; the rest are subagents.
  2. Detect the danger window. When the main lineage goes idle and a subagent is actively running, the main prefix is at risk of expiring.
  3. Warm. On an interval under the 5-minute TTL, it replays the main agent's last real request as a warm request: identical cacheable prefix, but max_tokens: 1 and no streaming. The single token is thrown away; the point is the prefill, which reads and refreshes the full cached prefix. Warm requests go directly to the API, never through the proxy, so they can't disturb real traffic.
  4. Result. When the subagent finishes, the main agent's cache is still warm. It pays a cheap read instead of a full rewrite.

Each warm costs a cache read (0.1x); each rewrite it prevents would have cost a write (1.25x) on a much larger prefix, so the trade is heavily in your favor.

Event logs & savings

Every session writes to:

~/.claude-thermos/logs/<session_id>/
├── events.jsonl    # append-only structured event stream
└── summary.json    # rollup totals, written when the session ends

events.jsonl records each request/response's token usage plus every warming decision (warm_fired, warm_result, cap_reached, resume_detected, and so on). summary.json is the rollup you'll usually read:

Field Meaning
warms_fired Warm requests sent
cache_read_total Tokens read back by those warms
episodes Idle-with-subagent episodes that ended in a successful resume (a rewrite actually avoided)
rewrite_avoided_tokens Tokens that would have been re-written, summed across episodes
warm_cost What warming cost you: 0.1 × cache_read_total
rewrite_avoided_cost What it saved: 1.25 × rewrite_avoided_tokens
net_savings rewrite_avoided_cost − warm_cost

All three cost figures are in base-input-token units (token counts already weighted by their cache multiplier). To turn net_savings into dollars, multiply it by your model's price per input token:

dollars saved ≈ net_savings × (input token price)

For example, at an input price of $3 / 1M tokens, a net_savings of 1_200_000 is about 1_200_000 × $3 / 1_000_000 = $3.60 saved that session.

sentences.en: Why your cache keeps expiring

blocks.html_en: Claude Code's prompt cache uses a 5-minute TTL. Every turn, your whole conversation history is served from cache at 0.1x the input price instead of being re-sent at full price, as long as the cache stays alive.

sentences.en: Claude Code's prompt cache uses a 5-minute TTL.
sentences.zh: Claude Code 的提示缓存使用 5 分钟的 TTL。

sentences.en: Every turn, your whole conversation history is served from cache at 0.1x the input price instead of being re-sent at full price, as long as the cache stays alive.
sentences.zh: 每次，只要缓存保持活动状态，您的整个对话历史记录都会以输入价格 0.1 倍的价格从缓存中提供，而不是以全价重新发送。

blocks.html_en: The cache expires if more than 5 minutes pass between requests on the same prefix. The dominant trigger for that gap is not you thinking. It's the main agent blocked on a subagent that runs longer than 5 minutes. A subagent has a different system prompt and tool set, so its requests have a different cache prefix and never refresh the main agent's. While the subagent works, the main agent's cached history ages untouched; past 5 minutes it's gone. sentences.en: The cache expires if more than 5 minutes pass between requests on the same prefix.
sentences.zh: 如果同一前缀的请求之间的时间间隔超过 5 分钟，缓存就会过期。

sentences.en: The dominant trigger for that gap is not you thinking.
sentences.zh: 造成这种差距的主要触发因素不是你的想法。

sentences.en: It's the main agent blocked on a subagent that runs longer than 5 minutes.
sentences.zh: 这是主代理在运行时间超过 5 分钟的子代理上被阻止。

sentences.en: A subagent has a different system prompt and tool set, so its requests have a different cache prefix and never refresh the main agent's.
sentences.zh: 子代理具有不同的系统提示符和工具集，因此其请求具有不同的缓存前缀，并且从不刷新主代理的请求。

sentences.en: While the subagent works, the main agent's cached history ages untouched; past 5 minutes it's gone.
sentences.zh: 当子代理工作时，主代理的缓存历史记录不会受到影响；过去5分钟就消失了。

sentences.en: When the subagent returns, the main agent resumes with a byte-identical, append-only history, and finds its cache missing, forcing a full re-encode at the 1.25x write rate.
sentences.zh: 当子代理返回时，主代理以字节相同、仅附加历史记录恢复，并发现其缓存丢失，强制以 1.25 倍写入速率完全重新编码。

blocks.html_en: By then the history is large, so the re-encode is expensive: individual collapses re-write 200K to 500K tokens. Measured across roughly 185 local sessions, these rebuilds accounted for about 22% of the total bill, money spent re-encoding content that was already cached moments earlier.

sentences.en: By then the history is large, so the re-encode is expensive: individual collapses re-write 200K to 500K tokens.
sentences.zh: 到那时历史记录就很大了，因此重新编码的成本很高：单个崩溃重新写入 200K 到 500K 令牌。

sentences.en: Measured across roughly 185 local sessions, these rebuilds accounted for about 22% of the total bill, money spent re-encoding content that was already cached moments earlier.
sentences.zh: 通过大约 185 个本地会话进行测量，这些重建约占总费用的 22%，即用于重新编码之前已缓存的内容的资金。

sentences.en: How it works
sentences.zh: 它是如何运作的

blocks.html_en: claude-thermos launches Claude Code behind a small local reverse proxy (it points ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL at a loopback port; all traffic still goes to the real Anthropic API).

sentences.en: claude-thermos launches Claude Code behind a small local reverse proxy (it points ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL at a loopback port; all traffic still goes to the real Anthropic API).
sentences.zh: claude-thermos 在小型本地反向代理后面启动 Claude Code（它在环回端口指向 ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL；所有流量仍然流向真正的 Anthropic API）。

blocks.html_en: • Observe. The proxy watches /v1/messages traffic and groups it into sessions and lineages, a lineage being one cache prefix, keyed by model + tool set + system text. The first tool-bearing lineage is the main agent; the rest are subagents.

sentences.en: Observe.
sentences.zh: 观察。

sentences.en: The proxy watches /v1/messages traffic and groups it into sessions and lineages, a lineage being one cache prefix, keyed by model + tool set + system text.
sentences.zh: 代理监视 /v1/messages 流量并将其分组为会话和沿袭，沿袭是一个缓存前缀，由模型 + 工具集 + 系统文本作为键控。

sentences.en: The first tool-bearing lineage is the main agent; the rest are subagents.
sentences.zh: 第一工具轴承世系为主代理；其余的是分代理。

blocks.html_en: • Detect the danger window. When the main lineage goes idle and a subagent is actively running, the main prefix is at risk of expiring.

sentences.en: Detect the danger window.
sentences.zh: 检测危险窗口。

sentences.en: When the main lineage goes idle and a subagent is actively running, the main prefix is at risk of expiring.
sentences.zh: 当主沿袭空闲且子代理正在运行时，主前缀有过期的风险。

blocks.html_en: • Warm. On an interval under the 5-minute TTL, it replays the main agent's last real request as a warm request: identical cacheable prefix, but max_tokens: 1 and no streaming. The single token is thrown away; the point is the prefill, which reads and refreshes the full cached prefix. Warm requests go directly to the API, never through the proxy, so they can't disturb real traffic.

sentences.en: Warm.
sentences.zh: 温暖的。

sentences.en: On an interval under the 5-minute TTL, it replays the main agent's last real request as a warm request: identical cacheable prefix, but max_tokens: 1 and no streaming.
sentences.zh: 在 5 分钟 TTL 下的时间间隔内，它将主代理的最后一个实际请求重播为热请求：相同的可缓存前缀，但 max_tokens: 1 并且没有流式传输。

sentences.en: The single token is thrown away; the point is the prefill, which reads and refreshes the full cached prefix.
sentences.zh: 单个令牌被丢弃；重点是预填充，它读取并刷新完整的缓存前缀。

sentences.en: Warm requests go directly to the API, never through the proxy, so they can't disturb real traffic.
sentences.zh: 热请求直接发送到 API，不通过代理，因此不会干扰真实流量。

blocks.html_en: • Result. When the subagent finishes, the main agent's cache is still warm. It pays a cheap read instead of a full rewrite.

sentences.en: Result.
sentences.zh: 结果。

sentences.en: When the subagent finishes, the main agent's cache is still warm.
sentences.zh: 当子代理完成时，主代理的缓存仍然是热的。

sentences.en: It pays a cheap read instead of a full rewrite.
sentences.zh: 它支付便宜的读取费用，而不是完全重写。

blocks.html_en: Each warm costs a cache read (0.1x); each rewrite it prevents would have cost a write (1.25x) on a much larger prefix, so the trade is heavily in your favor.

sentences.en: Each warm costs a cache read (0.1x); each rewrite it prevents would have cost a write (1.25x) on a much larger prefix, so the trade is heavily in your favor.
sentences.zh: 每次热消耗一次缓存读取 (0.1x)；它阻止的每次重写都会在更大的前缀上花费一次写入成本（1.25x），因此这笔交易对您非常有利。

sentences.zh: Summary.json 是您通常会阅读的汇总：

sentences.zh: 重写避免成本

blocks.html_en: For example, at an input price of $3 / 1M tokens, a net_savings of 1_200_000 is about 1_200_000 × $3 / 1_000_000 = $3.60 saved that session.

sentences.en: For example, at an input price of $3 / 1M tokens, a net_savings of 1_200_000 is about 1_200_000 × $3 / 1_000_000 = $3.60 saved that session.

content_html_zh:
停止付费重建您的克劳德代码缓存。 当您的主代理等待子代理超过 5 分钟时，其提示缓存会默默过期，并且下一回合将以写入速率重新编码您的整个对话，而不是廉价地读回。 在与许多子代理的长时间会话中，这大约占您账单的 20%。 claude-thermos 使缓存保持温暖，因此您无需缴纳该税。

Use

完全像平常一样运行 Claude Code，但是通过 claude-thermos 和 uvx 运行：

uvx claude-thermos                     # instead of: claude
uvx claude-thermos -p "fix the bug"    # any claude args pass straight through

需要 Python 3.11+ 以及 PATH 上的 claude CLI。

就是这样。 变暖在后台自动运行。 要在不更改命令的情况下禁用它运行，请设置 CLAUDE_WARMER_DISABLE=1。

调整（全部可选）：

Flag 默认 意义
--idle 270 在变暖开始之前，主力必须闲置几秒
- 间隔 270 升温周期之间的秒数
--最大周期 4 每个空闲片段的最大加热量（自动无限制）
--子代理窗口 540 子代理计为“仍处于活动状态”的秒数

为什么你的缓存总是过期

Claude Code 的提示缓存使用 5 分钟的 TTL。 每次，只要缓存保持活动状态，您的整个对话历史记录都会以输入价格 0.1 倍的价格从缓存中提供，而不是以全价重新发送。

如果同一前缀的请求之间的时间间隔超过 5 分钟，缓存就会过期。 造成这种差距的主要触发因素不是你的想法。 这是主代理在运行时间超过 5 分钟的子代理上被阻止。 子代理具有不同的系统提示符和工具集，因此其请求具有不同的缓存前缀，并且从不刷新主代理的请求。 当子代理工作时，主代理的缓存历史记录不会受到影响；过去5分钟就消失了。 当子代理返回时，主代理以字节相同、仅附加历史记录恢复，并发现其缓存丢失，强制以 1.25 倍写入速率完全重新编码。

到那时历史记录就很大了，因此重新编码的成本很高：单个崩溃重新写入 200K 到 500K 令牌。 通过大约 185 个本地会话进行测量，这些重建约占总费用的 22%，即用于重新编码之前已缓存的内容的资金。

它是如何运作的

claude-thermos 在小型本地反向代理后面启动 Claude Code（它在环回端口指向 ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL；所有流量仍然流向真正的 Anthropic API）。

  1. 观察。 代理监视 /v1/messages 流量并将其分组为会话和沿袭，沿袭是一个缓存前缀，由模型 + 工具集 + 系统文本作为键控。 第一工具轴承世系为主代理；其余的是分代理。
  2. 检测危险窗口。 当主沿袭空闲且子代理正在运行时，主前缀有过期的风险。
  3. 温暖的。 在 5 分钟 TTL 下的时间间隔内，它将主代理的最后一个实际请求重播为热请求：相同的可缓存前缀，但 max_tokens: 1 并且没有流式传输。 单个令牌被丢弃；重点是预填充，它读取并刷新完整的缓存前缀。 热请求直接发送到 API，不通过代理，因此不会干扰真实流量。
  4. 结果。 当子代理完成时，主代理的缓存仍然是热的。 它支付便宜的读取费用，而不是完全重写。

每次热消耗一次缓存读取 (0.1x)；它阻止的每次重写都会在更大的前缀上花费一次写入成本（1.25x），因此这笔交易对您非常有利。

事件日志和节省

每个会话都会写入：

~/.claude-thermos/logs/<session_id>/
├── events.jsonl    # append-only structured event stream
└── summary.json    # rollup totals, written when the session ends

events.jsonl 记录每个请求/响应的令牌使用情况以及每个预热决策（warm_fired、warm_result、cap_reached、resume_Detected 等）。 Summary.json 是您通常会阅读的汇总：

Field 意义
温暖_解雇 热情的请求已发送
缓存读取总数 那些温暖读回的令牌
剧集 以成功恢复结束的 Idle-with-subagent 事件（实际上避免了重写）
重写避免的令牌 会被重写、跨剧集求和的代币
温暖成本 变暖给您带来了哪些损失：0.1 × cache_read_total
重写避免成本 它节省了什么：1.25 × rewrite_avoided_tokens
净储蓄 rewrite_avoided_cost - Warm_cost

所有三个成本数字均以基本输入令牌为单位（令牌计数已按其缓存乘数加权）。 要将 net_ savings 转换为美元，请将其乘以模型的每个输入代币的价格：

dollars saved ≈ net_savings × (input token price)

例如，在输入价格为 3 美元/100 万代币时，1_200_000 的 net_ savings 约为 1_200_000 × $3 / 1_000_000 = 3.60 美元。
